CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Re: Carlos Isaac Flores
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan. Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
J. Scott Wever, Esq. Appearing for Plaintiffs. Petitioner Maria Veloz, mother and as guardian ad litem for minors Carlos Isaac Flores and JHOSBY FLORES.
Petitioner was sworn and examined. Interpreter: Laura Corleto, Sworn.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Total Settlement $4,500.00
Attorney's fess in the total amount of $1,187.00 payable to Wartelle, Weaver & Schreiber.

A net balance of $3,563.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Counsel to prepare Order Granting Minor's Compromise and Order to Deposit Money into Blocked Account at Well Fargo Bank One Montgomery Street, San Francisco, CA 94104.
Status Hearing Scheduled on 2/5/2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for filing the receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt was filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514.
